hypothesis: Incorporating electron beam dose rate as a dynamic conditioning variable during SAM-EM fine-tuning—by generating synthetic training videos that explicitly pair spatially varying radiolysis-induced contrast artifacts with their corresponding dose rate metadata—will enable the model to disentangle beam-induced particle motion from intrinsic diffusive dynamics, thereby allowing closed-loop LPTEM workflows to automatically adjust dose rate in real time to maintain segmentation fidelity above a target J&F threshold without sacrificing temporal resolution.
